statement.headerDoc:
STEP 946 — Analytic Number Theory Conjectures
  藤本伸樹 2026-04-21

  Three analytic/additive open problems:

  A. GOLDBACH CONJECTURE (weak + strong)
     Weak (Vinogradov, Helfgott 2013): every odd n > 5 = sum of 3 primes.  PROVED.
     Strong: every even n > 2 = sum of 2 primes. OPEN.
     New: Verified for all even n ≤ 10000. Best gap analysis.

  B. LEGENDRE'S CONJECTURE
     Between n² and (n+1)² there is always a prime. OPEN.
     New: Verified for all n ≤ 10000. Prime gap analysis.

  C. OPPERMANN'S CONJECTURE (stronger than Legendre)
     Between n(n-1) and n² and between
